title: Rek (disambiguation)
content:
'''Rek''' may refer to:

*'''[[Rek Minuu]]''', a droidsmith
*'''[[Rek Malorm]]''', a member of the [[Malorm family]]
*'''[[Rek (enforcer)|Rek]]''', an enforcer
*'''[[Rek (majordomo)|Rek]]''', a [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]]
*'''[[Rek (species)|Reks]]''', a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]
*'''[[Rek (star)|Rek]]''', a [[Star/Legends|star]] in the [[Guter Wade system]]
*'''[[Rek tea]]'''
*'''[[Rek'dul]]''', a [[Jensaarai/Legends|Jensaarai]] martial art
*'''[[J'rek de Mahdav]]''', a [[Human/Legends|Human]]
